期待后续，完结再补","text_exts":[{"e":68,"s":64,"text":"长矛老师","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%95%BF%E7%9F%9B%E8%80%81%E5%B8%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774116298E8707316%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227500239308640027416%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227482021031633226777%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%95%BF%E7%9F%9B%E8%80%81%E5%B8%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746289351,"group_id":"7482021031633226777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"评论随意，不回评可能是因为没印象了…不和沙比论长短","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+uvyEDrvSjrFQzpCFva2QVEyhZ+25qcQXoNqjVcRmZ/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/77d1baa5eace48eebb4d589cfe4efca2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701663&x-signature=2cMoQW%2FPnJgqBjvl1cWg8QdXoHA%3D","user_id":"3620061096447768","user_name":"只猫–"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3620061096447768","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7482021031633226777","book_info":{"abstract":"玩梗➕读档➕发癫➕直播➕娱乐圈➕双洁
林瞳穿成玛丽苏无脑文中的炮灰真千金，自己中毒抑郁而亡，家人也没好下场。
她：无所吊谓，你有你的主角光环，我有我的读档重来。
恋综上，假千金买通导演处处作弊：
做任务故意给她加大难度？无所谓，她会读档调换，让假千金累死累活结果一无所获！
赛马比赛给她的马下泻药？无所谓，她会读档重来，让假千金边跑边拉，绽放出绚烂粪之花！
每次游戏，无论假千金使出什么计谋，主角光环开的再大，她也能轻松应对，让对方破大防！
吃到好吃的还想吃？睡眠不足困困困？也没关系，她能读档重来无数次，直到吃到肚里撑不下、睡到两眼瞪得像铜铃！
…
季无声第一眼就讨厌林瞳，她聒噪、刻薄、有病。
随后，他发现自己陷入被动循环当中——
被迫重复地搬水泥、喂猪、洗澡、上厕所甚至重复做那种梦……
严重影响到了他的生活，还因此让别人对他产生各种误解，评价都从“冷冽禁欲、沉稳冷静、优雅绅士”变成了“癫击小子”。
很快，季无声发现罪魁祸首是林瞳。
他更讨厌她了。
不仅聒噪、刻薄、有病，还邪恶歹毒。
然而后来，
他从背后抱住她，深情引诱：“你不是能读档重来么？不如我们再来一晚？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ee6121e815e19042e9421a1851e601ea","author":"爱吃烤面筋","author_id":"","book_id":"7482021031633226777","book_name":"那我问你！我发癫你们是不是很爽","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d89078","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7482021037186499097","read_count":"13904","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"421325"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"156","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,娱乐圈,直播,穿书,双洁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/35c322be14165c04313a94459e279a83~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779300298&x-signature=GOFnc6bYaKCNx9nESOPBjeZrdQA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2309419522334487","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220204580A9B3C685205E8707316"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12341,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7819},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7525436059839578905","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"开心😃看完了，整篇文章很搞笑，最后也煽情。最主要的是基本上没有什么恶毒反派作死，虽然也有真假千金的身份但父母很明是非，不心慈手软，女主身边的朋友也都很可爱。男主也真是男妈妈级别的了，中间一些地方看的人真是忍不住嘴角上扬啊[送心]而且章节不是很多，不怕看一半就没有兴趣了。而且设置也很新颖，我之前都没有读过这种的读档文，总之我觉得很好看，超级推荐","text_exts":[{"e":87,"s":84,"text":"男妈妈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%B7%E5%A6%88%E5%A6%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774116298E8707316%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227525436059839578905%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227482021031633226777%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%B7%E5%A6%88%E5%A6%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752156926,"group_id":"7482021031633226777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无聊无聊无聊无聊无聊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxSQAU6BkBUMAY1dUI3DM538deLvfgQ7Qj9zLP6tPG44","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a9b8fdf3d84d484e9e88e6a7c9f5b715~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703689&x-signature=n28%2F7U9p%2Bf9AxZ3vttyY0DQcVgM%3D","user_id":"2533693045605960","user_name":"双倍珍珠的奶茶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2533693045605960","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name" rded_count":0,"listen_duration":15976,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":47040,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6584},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529736152998413118","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别好看啊，两个都是小苦瓜，相互救赎，他们是对方的春天，给对方带来了无限的生机。
大大写的特别好，内容充实搞笑，很多梗，每章都很给我带来快乐，我真的一直在嘎嘎笑啊。
看到瞳姐身世的时候，真的很有感触，大大写的真的很好，我真的为瞳姐感受到了深深的绝望，但小鸡总出现真的让我特别特别感动。
瞳瞳是一个坚强内心强大却又因为某些事而不懂爱拧巴的人，但小鸡总可以说是一个引导型恋人，他们的绝配毋庸置疑。
无八瞳城就是坠吊的！！！超级甜甜甜！！！无八瞳城天生一对！！！","text_exts":[{"e":185,"s":180,"text":"引导型恋人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%95%E5%AF%BC%E5%9E%8B%E6%81%8B%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774116298E8707316%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227529736152998413118%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227482021031633226777%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%95%E5%AF%BC%E5%9E%8B%E6%81%8B%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753158055,"group_id":"7482021031633226777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"脑细胞疑似被耗尽","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7jYxpsjVWQMd/zsbUWOnPIrHSp6Gbf9uIFZT/zA+7AY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705984&x-signature=QHDhoc9A4xYYe1ipmBRBiQQhjZY%3D","user_id":"3522469280364878","user_name":"wxs懒觉y"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3522469280364878","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7482021031633226777","book_info":{"abstract":"玩梗➕读档➕发癫➕直播➕娱乐圈➕双洁
林瞳穿成玛丽苏无脑文中的炮灰真千金，自己中毒抑郁而亡，家人也没好下场。
她：无所吊谓，你有你的主角光环，我有我的读档重来。

做任务故意给她加大难度？无所谓，她会读档调换，让假千金累死累活结果一无所获！

每次游戏，无论假千金使出什么计谋，主角光环开的再大，她也能轻松应对，让对方破大防！

季无声第一眼就讨厌林瞳，她聒噪、刻薄、有病。
随后，他发现自己陷入被动循环当中——
被迫重复地搬水泥、喂猪、洗澡、上厕所甚至重复做那种梦……
严重影响到了他的生活，还因此让别人对他产生各种误解，评价都从“冷冽禁欲、沉稳冷静、优雅绅士”变成了“癫击小子”。
很快，季无声发现罪魁祸首是林瞳。
他更讨厌她了。
